title: 10 Pcs Red Baskets For Gifts Empty 30 x 26 x 10.5cm Gift Basket Hamper Kit Thick Kraft Gift Basket Wine Basket for Baby Shower Wedding Christmas Birthday Snacks Farmers Market
features: Gift Basket Set: When you purchase our gift basket hamper kit, you'll receive 10 red baskets and 10 clear plastic bags. The vibrant colors add a festive touch to your gifts, while the clear plastic bags effectively protect your gifts, ensuring they're safe during shipping and display

Ideal Size: Our red baskets for gifts measure 30.5 x 25.5 x 10.5 cm / 12.01 x 10.04 x 4.13 inches, providing plenty of space for specific items. The plastic bag measures 60 x 80 cm / 23.62 x 31.50 inches, offering a large size that can fully cover the basket, making it convenient and easy to use

Durable Material: Our snack organizing basket is made of high-quality thick kraft paper, which is sturdy and durable, can hold heavier gifts without falling apart, even during transportation, it can remain intact, allowing you to give gifts with peace of mind.

Personalized Touches: You can add a personal touch to your thick kraft gift baskets and bags by decorating them as you like. Whether you add a drawing, a greeting, or tie a ribbon, you can make it unique and make the recipient feel your thoughtfulness and satisfaction

Wide range of uses: Our diy bulk gift basket kits are versatile and can be used for many occasions, such as graduations, anniversaries, festivals, weddings, parties and many other occasions, bringing a lot of convenience to life
description: Features: Our red gift basket sets are made of thick kraft paper, making them durable and sturdy enough to hold a variety of items. Whether you're using them for wine, snacks, DIY gift baskets, or as donation baskets for charity events, these empty baskets are the perfect choice, making it easy to create a unique and memorable gift experience! Material: Kraft Color: Red Size: 30.5 x 25.5 x 10.5 cm / 12.01 x 10.04 x 4.13 inches Package Includes: 10 x Red Basket 10 x Plastic Packaging Bag Notes: For manual measurement, please allow slight errors in size. The color may have a slight difference due to different screen displays.
